headline: Dog Haus partners with Keurig Dr Pepper in exclusive deal
summary: The fast-casual chain will offer the beverage company’s fountain and ready-to-drink options and also use the products in cocktails and other innovations.

raw.headline: Dog Haus partners with Keurig Dr Pepper in exclusive deal
raw.summary: The fast-casual chain will offer the beverage company’s fountain and ready-to-drink options and also use the products in cocktails and other innovations.

headline: Coca-Cola Stock's Loudest Signal Is The One It Stopped Saying
summary: The company is celebrating a new 'balanced' growth model, but its quiet de-emphasis on pure pricing power arrives just as margins show their first real crack in years.

raw.headline: Coca-Cola Stock's Loudest Signal Is The One It Stopped Saying
raw.summary: The company is celebrating a new 'balanced' growth model, but its quiet de-emphasis on pure pricing power arrives just as margins show their first real crack in years.
